name: AddressCategoryCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a kind of address.

name: AngularMinuteSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a minute of a degree, with a restricted range of 0 (inclusive) to 60 (exclusive).

name: AngularSecondSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a second of a minute, with a restricted range of 0 (inclusive) to 60 (exclusive).

name: BinaryHashFunctionCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a hash function used to generate a hash value representing an object encoded in a binary format.

name: BooleanListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a white space-delimited list of boolean.

name: ContactInformationAvailabilityCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a period of time or a situation in which an entity is available to be contacted with the given contact information.

name: DayOfWeekCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for days of the week.

name: DecimalListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a white space-delimited list of decimal.

name: Degree180PlusMinusSimpleType
documentation: A data type for an angle measured in degrees between -180 and 180.

name: Degree360SimpleType
documentation: A data type for a value between 0 (inclusive) and 360 (exclusive).

name: Degree90PlusMinusSimpleType
documentation: A data type for an angle measured in degrees between -90 and 90.

name: Degree90SimpleType
documentation: A data type for a value between 0 (inclusive) and 90 (exclusive).

name: DirectionCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for compass directions.

name: DoubleListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a white space-delimited list of double.

name: EmploymentPositionBasisCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a nature or duration of the employment position.

name: EmptyReasonCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a reason why a data value was not provided.

name: FinancialAccountHolderCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a kind of financial account holder.

name: FinancialAccountNumberCategoryCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a kind of financial account number.

name: ImagePoseCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for angles of an entity's pose in a photograph.

name: IntegerListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a list of integers.

name: LatitudeDegreeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a degree of latitude.

name: LongitudeDegreeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a degree of longitude.

name: MessageCategoryFATCACodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for kind of Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA) message.

name: MilitaryDischargeCategoryCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for kinds of discharges a person may receive from military service.

name: NonNegativeDecimalSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a decimal value with a minimum value of 0.

name: NonNegativeIntegerListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a white space-delimited list of nonnegative integers.

name: PassportCategoryCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a kind of passport.

name: PaymentMethodCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a specific method of payment.

name: PersonNameCategoryCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a kind of person name.

name: PersonPronounsCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a set of third-person pronouns that can be used in place of a person's name.

name: PersonUnionCategoryCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type describing the legally recognized union between two persons.

name: PersonUnionStatusCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type describing the legal status of a person's union with another person.

name: PositiveIntegerListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a white space-delimited list of positive integers.

name: QuarterIDSimpleType
documentation: A data type for an identifier of a three-month period in a calendar or fiscal year.

name: RelativeLocationHeadingSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a compass heading of a direction from a reference location.

name: SeparationCategoryCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a code that identifies the type of separation between the parties in a Person Union.

name: StringListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a white space-delimited list of string.

name: TokenListSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a white space-delimited list of tokens.

name: UTMCoordinateSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a coordinate from the Universal Transverse Mercator (UTM) Coordinate System, which represents a location with a hemisphere, zone, an easting value, and a northing value.

name: YesNoUnknownCodeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a ternary or three-option indicator representing true/yes, false/no, and unknown.

name: ZuluDateTimeSimpleType
documentation: A data type for a dateTime constrained to always be Zulu time, time at the Zero Meridian.
